name: video-gen
description: Generate short animated videos for many use cases — hard-concept explainers, deep-research videos, product launches, demos, codebase walkthroughs, and animated story/book-summary videos — via a 5-stage pipeline. Picks narrative structure and visual style per video. Reads memory for personalization. Uses HyperFrames for rendering, Manim for math scenes, Cartesia or ElevenLabs for narration.
